---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or change to existing behavior
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you're trying to do

<!-- The use case in plain language. What workflow does this unblock? -->

## What's missing today

<!-- What forces you to work around it? Screenshot or paste of current behavior helps. -->

## What you'd like to see

<!-- Sketch the proposed CLI / config / UI shape. Code blocks are fine. -->

```bash
# example of how the new thing would feel
holoctl <new-command> ...
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways this could be solved (incl. "do nothing"). Why is this one preferred? -->

## Scope

- [ ] CLI command / flag
- [ ] Web dashboard
- [ ] Compile target (which AI tool? new or existing?)
- [ ] Discovery / repo handling
- [ ] Board / ticket schema
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Other: _____

## Notes

<!-- Anything else worth flagging — backwards compat concerns, performance, etc. -->
